arts.ttl: Jürgen Klopp agent says Liverpool experience influenced Red Bull decision
arts.sum: Jürgen Klopp left Liverpool at the end of last season as a legend of the club. There was an awful lot of gratitude sent towards the German manager and not only was he successful on the pitch with the Reds but he also managed to strike up a relationship more generally as a human. Many The post Jürgen Klopp agent says Liverpool experience influenced Red Bull decision appeared first on Sport Witness.

On the eve of the game, Girona coach Míchel Sánchez was full of praise for his team’s opponents - a side who are quick to punish mistakes: “ Liverpool dominates every concept of the game from defence to attack, but if we give our best we will be in with chance because in football anything is possible. One of key areas is in transitions and Liverpool are the best team in the world at that .
